g.text: replay × 10 (Euler steps), reads prefix + writes suffix
Schematic only: this diagram visualises the order of phases, NOT their relative durations or compute cost.

Engine.__init__ runs once (fixed bootstrap order); scheduler.setup() captures one CUDA graph per runner; scheduler.step() then replays them in a fixed dance — vision per robot, LLM once, expert × N denoise steps.
